question: [File: 'File Name: rest/routes/blockRoute.js -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: getBlocks()] Can an unprivileged user exploit the `BlockViewModel` serialization of block data to extract authorization_list fields (r, s, yParity, address, chainId, nonce) that are included in the block response without any field-level access control, enabling signature harvesting from any block?
